hooks.command: echo '=== PROJECT_STATE.md (current priorities) ===' >&2; head -60 docs/PROJECT_STATE.md 2>/dev/null >&2; echo '' >&2; echo '=== Above: live priorities. Full file: docs/PROJECT_STATE.md (~260 lines). History: docs/PROJECT_STATE_HISTORY.md. CLAUDE.md governs. ===' >&2; exit 0
echo 'TOOL CHECK: Use Grep instead of grep/rg. Use Glob instead of find/ls. Use Read instead of cat/head/tail. Bash is for git, npm, builds, and tests only.' >&2; exit 0

echo 'CLAUDE.MD RULES:' >&2; echo '  - No console.log (use auditLogger)' >&2; echo '  - No any type (use unknown + type guards)' >&2; echo '  - No CORS/CSP wildcards (use ALLOWED_ORIGINS)' >&2; echo '  - catch(err: unknown) pattern required' >&2; echo '  - No forwardRef (React 19 ref-as-prop)' >&2; echo '  - import.meta.env.VITE_* only (no process.env)' >&2; exit 0
